title: Two killed in elephant attacks in the Nilgiris; ₹50,000 interim aid released
summary: A temple priest near an abandoned stone quarry in Mudumalai Tiger Reserve and a youth returning from a temple festival near Kotagiri were killed in separate elephant attacks. The Forest Department has released ₹50,000 as interim compensation to each family.

title: Nilgiris under heavy rainfall warning on May 14, 15 and 17
summary: The Nilgiris district has been placed under a heavy rainfall warning on May 14, 15 and 17 as a low-pressure system is set to trigger widespread rainfall across Tamil Nadu's ghat districts.

title: TVK draws a blank in the Nilgiris; DMK wins two, BJP one
summary: TVK has drawn a blank in the Nilgiris district in the 2026 assembly elections. DMK has won two seats including Valparai after 30 years, while BJP has bagged one.

title: District Collector inaugurates renovated male in-patient ward at Coonoor hospital
summary: The District Collector inaugurated the renovated male in-patient ward at Coonoor Government Lawley Hospital, with upgraded oxygen lines, beds and patient amenities.

title: Nilgiris forest fire totally contained, says state government
summary: The Tamil Nadu government has confirmed that the recent Nilgiris forest fire has been totally contained. Cooling operations are continuing as a precaution.

title: Government Polytechnic College Ooty admissions open for 2026-27
summary: Student admissions are now underway at the Government Polytechnic College, Ooty, for the academic year 2026-2027. The institution has expanded its diploma intake this year.
